_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion. It does not mean the criterion has been verified by a formal audit. Run audit-rules.json checks before changing overall_status.

criteria.title: Info and Relationships
criteria.evidence: ARIA Tabs pattern conveys tab role/state via role='tab', aria-selected, role='tablist', and role='tabpanel'. Relationships expressed through aria-controls and aria-labelledby. TAB-A11Y-001 and TAB-A11Y-002 enforce required ARIA attributes.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Default text (#161616 on white) ≈ 18:1 (pass). Idle text (#384250 on white) ≈ 8.5:1 (pass). Disabled text (#9DA4AE on white) ≈ 2.9:1 — exempt per WCAG inactive component exception. All text/bg combinations estimated to pass.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.evidence: Selection indicator color (#1B8354 on white) ≈ 4.8:1 (passes 3:1 threshold). Divider (#D2D6DB on white) ≈ 1.6:1 — decorative separator, no informational boundary role, may be exempt. Focus ring (white inner + dark outer) provides sufficient contrast on all backgrounds.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: <button> elements are keyboard operable by default. Tab key enters the tablist. Arrow key navigation between tabs requires JavaScript (documented in tab.contract.md §7). TAB-A11Y-005 flags missing JavaScript wiring if no keyboard-nav script is detected.

criteria.title: Focus Order
criteria.evidence: Selected tab receives tabindex='0'; all other tabs have tabindex='-1'. Only the active tab is in the natural tab order. Arrow keys move focus between tabs. TAB-A11Y-006 validates tabindex assignment.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.evidence: Focus ring implemented via ::after pseudo-element on :focus-visible. Two-layer ring: white inner border + dark outer box-shadow ensures visibility on any background color.

criteria.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria.evidence: role='tab', aria-selected, aria-controls, id on tabs. role='tablist', aria-label on list. role='tabpanel', aria-labelledby, id on panels. TAB-A11Y-001 through TAB-A11Y-003 enforce all required ARIA attributes.

standards.name: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide — Tabs Pattern

criteria.title: Tab panel labeling via aria-labelledby
criteria.evidence: Each panel has aria-labelledby matching the id of its corresponding tab. TAB-A11Y-003 enforces this relationship.

criteria.title: Focus management — roving tabindex
criteria.evidence: Template.html implements roving tabindex: selected tab has tabindex='0', others have tabindex='-1'. JavaScript must update tabindex on focus change. TAB-A11Y-006 validates static tabindex assignment.

criteria.title: Vertical tablist must declare aria-orientation
criteria.evidence: Vertical tab list must include aria-orientation='vertical'. TAB-A11Y-007 flags its absence.

criteria.title: Component must use design tokens for all visual values
criteria.evidence: All visual values in tab.css reference CSS custom properties (--tab-*). Hardcoded values allowed only in the proposed :root token block. TAB-TOKEN-001 enforces no hardcoded values in component selectors.

criteria.title: RTL layout support is mandatory
criteria.evidence: tab.css uses [dir='rtl'] selectors. Vertical indicator flips left→right. Horizontal icon/text order reverses. TAB-RTL-001 enforces no physical left/right properties in base selectors.

criteria.title: Tab button must use <button> element
criteria.evidence: tab.contract.md §4 and §9 specify <button> as the only valid tab root. TAB-STRUCT-001 enforces this at the DOM level.

criteria.title: Selected state driven by aria-selected, not class
criteria.evidence: tab.css uses [aria-selected='true'] as the CSS hook for selected appearance. No .is-selected class exists. TAB-STRUCT-002 flags any class-based selected state.

criteria.title: Arrow key keyboard navigation must be implemented by consuming JS
criteria.evidence: CSS cannot implement keyboard navigation. The contract documents requirements in §7. No automated rule exists to verify JS implementation. Manual review required.

criteria.title: Arabic language font support required
criteria.evidence: IBM Plex Sans Arabic via --tab-font-family. Both .tab and .tab-list inherit this token.

criteria.title: Label language must match document language context
criteria.evidence: Cannot be verified automatically. Documented in tab.contract.md §10. Manual review required.

variant_compliance_notes.disabled tabs: WCAG 1.4.3: Disabled text (#9DA4AE on white) ≈ 2.9:1 — below 4.5:1 but exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 inactive UI component exception. Using aria-disabled='true' keeps tabs in tab order for screen reader discoverability.
variant_compliance_notes.horizontal large size: WCAG 2.5.5: Large tab padding (16px all) gives a generous touch target. AA does not mandate a specific minimum for non-interactive resizing — satisfactory.
variant_compliance_notes.vertical small size: WCAG 2.5.5: Vertical small has 2px vertical padding. Touch height may be very compact. Use cautiously in touch interfaces.
variant_compliance_notes.focus ring: Enhanced beyond Figma specification: added outer dark box-shadow to white inner ring for visibility on white/light backgrounds. This improves WCAG 2.4.7 compliance over the Figma-specified white-only ring.
variant_compliance_notes.divider (non-text contrast): WCAG 1.4.11: Divider #D2D6DB on white ≈ 1.6:1. If divider is treated as decorative separator (not a UI boundary), it may be exempt. Flag for manual review.
